nodes.label: M001: v1.8 UX Polish + Proto Ergonomics
Phase: validating-milestone
S01: Keyboard Shortcuts + Field Copy
T01: Installed react-hotkeys-hook, extracted usePlatformLabel hook from Sidebar.tsx, and created CopyButton component with clipboard + icon-swap feedback

T02: Added Clear button with RotateCcw icon, Cmd+Shift+R clear shortcut, Cmd+Enter send shortcut (dual-registered for form + CodeMirror), copy icons on ScalarField/EnumField/BytesField, and Send button tooltip
T03: Wired Cmd+O file open and Cmd+1/2/3 tab switch shortcuts in AppLayout, with platform-correct tooltips on RightPanel tabs
T04: Added integration test exercising all keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+Enter send, Cmd+Shift+R clear, Cmd+O open, Cmd+1/2/3 tab switch) and CopyButton clipboard flow end-to-end through AppLayout
S02: Proto File Management
T01: Added reload_proto and check_paths_exist Rust commands with invoke_handler registration and fs:allow-exists capability
T02: Wired reloadProto/checkPathsExist IPC, recent files store with stale detection, Reload button in FileSection, and Cmd+R shortcut
T03: Added inline IncludePathManager component with removable path chips, directory picker, and auto-reload on add/remove
T04: Added 18 unit and integration tests covering reload, recent files, and include path management
S03: Connection Quick-Switch + Draft Persistence
T01: Created useDraftStore with tauri-plugin-store persistence, LRU eviction at 50 entries, and App.tsx mount loading
T02: Wired draft save/restore/clear in FormPanel: auto-saves on debounced change, restores on message type switch via setPendingReplayValues, clears draft on Clear button
T03: Added connection quick-switch dropdown in PublishBar with colored status dot, profile loading on mount, and plan-run guard that blocks switching with toast warning
T04: Added 23 unit and integration tests covering draft store logic, FormPanel draft wiring, and PublishBar connection quick-switch with plan-run guard
S04: Randomizer + Field Type Tooltips
T01: Added field_number: u32 to Rust FieldSchema and field_number: number to TypeScript FieldSchema, populated from FieldDescriptor::number() in extractor
T02: Created generateRandomValues utility handling all proto field types and FieldTooltip component showing type/field number/cardinality on hover
T03: Wired Randomize button into FormPanel header and applied FieldTooltip to all 8 field components
T04: Added 23 tests covering generateRandomValues (all proto types), FieldTooltip (7 field kinds), and Randomize button integration (render, click, dirty field pass-through)
S05: Schema Explorer Tree
T01: Added EnumSchema to Rust types and extractor, TypeScript types, and updated all test fixtures with enums: []
T02: Built SchemaExplorer tree component with message/field/enum/oneof nodes, recursive guard, depth cap, and wired into Sidebar
T03: Added 13 SchemaExplorer tests covering tree rendering, field badges, repeated/map indicators, enum expansion, recursive guard, MAX_DEPTH enforcement, click-to-select, and oneof branches
